prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次约9601→9205→8448→8391→7161，整体呈波动上升趋势（位次数字减小，竞争加剧），近两年从8391提升至7161，提升约1230名；2025年基准 约7161名；本省计划2021–2025年均为55人，2026年计划56人，较2025年小幅扩招约1.8%，竞争略有缓和。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第 73名（2026年），近年排名在60–73之间波动，整体稳定；近年声誉平稳，无明显负面或正面事件；抖音关注度一般，未进入热度排名前列；未见明显投档断档 记录。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度高热推荐，石油工程、化工等传统专业热度平稳；本省2026年考生总数约82000人，较2025年71938人增加约14%，竞争明显加剧；省控线2025年本科批476分，近年缓慢上升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续上升趋势（竞争加剧）、2026年计划小幅扩招（缓和竞争）及本省考生大幅增加（竞争加剧），考生增加的影响大 于扩招影响，预计2026年最低位次在2025年基准7161名基础上略有后移；预测最低位次约7189名，区间6689–7689名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 石油工程（入校后可选拔进入石油工程类（未来）特色班、油气+人工智能实验班）
- 计算机科学与技术（入校后可选拔进入人工智能类特色班）
- 电子信息工程（入校后可选拔进入海洋信息类特色班）
- 自动化（入校后可选拔进入仪器与控制类特色班）
- 法学（入校后可选拔进入涉外法治基地班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 会计学（入校后可选拔进入经济管理实验班、会计学ACCA方向班）
- 油气储运工程（入学后可选拔进入能源储运类特色班、数力拔尖基地班）
- 软件工程（入校后可选拔进入人工智能类特色班）
- 机械类（智能装备工程）
- 资源勘查工程（拔尖班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 化工与制药类（智能化工）
- 材料类
- 过程装备与控制工程（入校后可选拔进入碳中和未来班）
- 应用化学（含化学、应用化学）
- 船舶与海洋工程（入校后可选拔进入机械类特色班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约7189名，区间6689–7689名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档为主、一档冲刺、三档保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<6689名）可重点冲一档王牌专业（石油工程、计算 机、电子信息）；位次在区间中段（约7189名附近）以二档专业为主力选择；位次接近区间上限（>7689名）建议以三档专业保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking approximately changed from 9601 → 9205 → 8448 → 8391 → 7161, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (ranking number decreases, competition intensifies). In the last two years, it improved from 8391 to 7161, an increase of about 1230 places. The 2025 baseline is approximately 7161. The provincial enrollment plan was 55 students each year from 2021 to 2025, and the 2026 plan is 56 students, a slight expansion of about 1.8% compared to 2025, easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; approximately ranked 73rd on the Soft Science Main Ranking (2026), with recent rankings fluctuating between 60 and 73, overall stable. Recent reputation is stable, with no significant negative or positive events. Douyin attention is average, not in the top of popularity rankings. No obvious record of enrollment gaps.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended due to social popularity. Traditional majors like Petroleum Engineering and Chemical Engineering have stable popularity. The total number of examinees in this province in 2026 is about 82,000, an increase of about 14% compared to 71,938 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. The provincial control line for the undergraduate batch in 2025 was 476 points, slowly rising in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward trend in historical rankings (intensified competition), the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (easing competition), and the significant increase in provincial examinees (intensified competition), the impact of the increase in examinees outweighs the expansion. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly decrease from the 2025 baseline of 7161. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 7189, with a range of 6689–7689.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Petroleum Engineering (can be selected into Petroleum Engineering (Future) Special Class, Oil & Gas + AI Experimental Class after enrollment)
- Computer Science and Technology (can be selected into AI Special Class after enrollment)
- Electronic Information Engineering (can be selected into Marine Information Special Class after enrollment)
- Automation (can be selected into Instrument and Control Special Class after enrollment)
- Law (can be selected into International Rule of Law Base Class after enrollment).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Accounting (can be selected into Economics and Management Experimental Class, Accounting ACCA Direction Class after enrollment)
- Oil and Gas Storage and Transportation Engineering (can be selected into Energy Storage and Transportation Special Class, Mathematics and Mechanics Top-Notch Base Class after enrollment)
- Software Engineering (can be selected into AI Special Class after enrollment)
- Mechanical (Intelligent Equipment Engineering)
- Resource Exploration Engineering (Top-Notch Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical (Intelligent Chemical Engineering)
- Materials
- Process Equipment and Control Engineering (can be selected into Carbon Neutral Future Class after enrollment)
- Applied Chemistry (including Chemistry, Applied Chemistry)
- Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering (can be selected into Mechanical Special Class after enrollment).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 7189, range 6689–7689. For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, use Tier 1 for a stretch, and Tier 3 as safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<6689), focus on Tier 1 flagship majors (Petroleum Engineering, Computer Science, Electronic Information). For rankings in the middle of the range (around 7189), choose Tier 2 majors as the main option. For rankings near the upper limit (>7689), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety.
